diagrams.title: Azure Cloud Architecture Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of Azure's physical and virtual infrastructure from global resources down to individual virtual machines, including regions, availability zones, and virtual networks.
diagrams.purpose: Explains how Azure organizes its global infrastructure and how customers deploy resources within this hierarchy

diagrams.title: Azure Core Service Categories
diagrams.description: Illustrates the main categories of Azure services organized by function: Compute, Storage, Networking, Databases, Analytics, AI + Machine Learning, and Internet of Things.
diagrams.purpose: Provides an overview of the breadth of Azure services available for building cloud solutions

diagrams.title: Azure Virtual Network Architecture
diagrams.description: Demonstrates a typical Azure networking setup showing virtual networks, subnets, network security groups, VPN gateway, ExpressRoute, load balancers, and connectivity to on-premises networks.
diagrams.purpose: Explains how Azure networking components work together to provide secure, scalable network architecture
